# SQLite server performance test with ultra-aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts to test performance limits
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=500ms
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=400ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=300ms
env SQLITE_DB_PATH=$WORK/perf_test.db

# Start server with minimal startup time allowance
exec timeout 6s go run . &
wait 100ms

# Test rapid table creation
cat > rapid_create.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_statement",
    "arguments": {
      "statement": "CREATE TABLE speed_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT)"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "$(<rapid_create.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'executed successfully'

# Test rapid bulk insert
cat > bulk_insert.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_statement",
    "arguments": {
      "statement": "INSERT INTO speed_test (value) VALUES ('test1'), ('test2'), ('test3'), ('test4'), ('test5')"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "$(<bulk_insert.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Rows affected: 5'

# Test rapid query execution
cat > rapid_query.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_query",
    "arguments": {
      "query": "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM speed_test"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_query.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout '"count": 5'

# Test rapid schema access
cat > rapid_schema.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "get_schema",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_schema.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout '"name": "speed_test"'

# Test rapid sequential operations
bash 'start=$(date +%s%N); timeout 200ms echo "$(<rapid_query.json)" | mcpcat - > /dev/null; timeout 200ms echo "$(<rapid_schema.json)" | mcpcat - > /dev/null; end=$(date +%s%N); duration=$((($end - $start) / 1000000)); echo "2-op duration: ${duration}ms"; test $duration -lt 500'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f rapid_create.json bulk_insert.json rapid_query.json rapid_schema.json
